title: bouteloua annua
intro: Bouteloua annua, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua annua include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Bouteloua annua can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
